TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Armenia, title = Armenia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Armenia} }

S.FORM: Armenia I tini i 40 00 N, 45 00 E, i Asiya ko Armeniya, i kawali no Turki . Polong no sekalay i 29,743 km2, saka 143 ko katata'ang i hekal. O sekalay no sera i, 28,203 km2, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,540 km2. Polong i 3,051,250 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 59.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 9.10%, malo no roma to a sera 31.20%. siyoto O (((Yerevan)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad, i saka 9 folad, 21 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Serzh Azati Sargsyan , patirengan a romi'ad i 2008 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. Talihafan CIA 外交部
S.PHON: armənia i tini i ** ** n, ** ** ə, i asija ko~u armənija, i kawaɾi no~u to~u~urki . po~uɾo~uŋ no~u səkaɾaj i **,*** km*, saka *** ko~u katataʡaŋ i ħəkaɾ. o~u səkaɾaj no~u səra i, **,*** km*, no~u nano~um a səkaɾaj i, *,*** km*. po~uɾo~uŋ i *,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. səra masakiɾaʦ ko~u səra o~u maɾo~u kakao~umaħən a səra **.**%, maɾo~u no~u kiɾakiɾaŋan a səra *.**%, maɾo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a səra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((jərəb~van)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umirəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piħiratəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, i saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit anini i ʦi sər*ħ a*ati sar*sjan , patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. taɾiħafan ʦia ***
S.FORM: Armenia I tini i 40 00 N, 45 00 E, i Asiya ko Armeniya, i kawali no Turki . Polong no sekalay i 29,743 km2, saka 143 ko katata'ang i hekal. O sekalay no sera i, 28,203 km2, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,540 km2. Polong i 3,051,250 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 59.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 9.10%, malo no roma to a sera 31.20%. siyoto O (((Yerevan)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad, i saka 9 folad, 21 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Serzh Azati Sargsyan , patirengan a romi'ad i 2008 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. Talihafan CIA 外交部
